series_metadata.series_title: Case Hearing Files of Disciplinary Actio
series_metadata.series_description: File include charge letter, hearing officer report commission findings and order, transcripts, appeal documents, court certification and court decisions. Case hearing files of disciplinary actions initiated against real estate licensees pursuant 4735 and 119.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain master microfilm in off site storage for 20 years, then destroy. Retain diazo copy in operating area for 20 years, then destroy ; Paper: After the case is considered to be closed, retain hard copy records for 3 years, then microfilm. After microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy hard copy, Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred
